parsed_review.summary:
Read-only review of CP00-952 (Risk A, 10 units, RP30.P06.M06.S04-RP30.P06.M07.S01; 9 HRPermission + 1 SensitiveGuard, all implementation/HRX-embedded). The pack-level claim is descriptor-only (manifest production_ready:false/runtime_ready:false/implementation_layer:descriptor pre-review; production_ready_flag hrx_hr_permission_sensitive_guard_m06_m07_bridge_descriptor_verified at closeout, matching the verified CP945-CP951 precedent). The claim is fully supported by source inspection.

Implementation: registry.js HRX_CP952_PACK_BINDING (upstream CP00-951, next CP00-953/RP30.P06.M07.S02), HRX_CP952_REQUIRED_SECTION_ROWS (M06 HRPermission subphases 4-12 = 9, M07 SensitiveGuard subphase 1 = 1), HRX_CP952_REQUIREMENTS (deliverable implementation:10; micro_title HRPermission:9/SensitiveGuard:1), and createHrxCp952HrPermissionSensitiveGuardBridgeDescriptor are well-formed. The shared createHrxDomainRows factory sets hr_permission_descriptor/sensitive_guard_descriptor, resolves entity_name to HRPermission/SensitiveGuard, and forces every runtime/record-write/policy-runtime/decision/bypass/runtime-receipt/real-data/credential field to false with separate_product_created=false and domain_bridge_descriptor/sensitive_hr_guard_required/h30_review_only/c30_read_only set as required. The descriptor spreads HRX_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION and HRX_BLOCKED_CLAIMS (incl. enterprise_trust_from_local_validation) and keeps domain_entities HRPermission/SensitiveGuard all-false.

Validators: validators.js validateHrxCp952...Coverage enforces range/risk/unit-count/distribution/section-row counts; validateHrxCp952...Descriptor enforces descriptor/source-descriptor type (source HrxCp951AuditHintHrPermissionBridgeDescriptor), authority boundary (claude_is_final_approval:false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust:false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening:true, runtime_opening_pack_id CP00-953), per-row + per-entity boundary closure, baseline decisions, Hermes packet (emits_runtime_receipt:false), Claude packet (read_only:true, promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false), capabilities, safety gates, and no-leak guards; validateHrxPeopleContract pins latest_pack/latest_projection to CP00-952.

Evidence: model.test.js covers binding/coverage, descriptor boundary closure, and the generated contract with deepEqual(errors,[]). contracts/hrx-people-contract.json is regenerated and consistent (current_pack/latest_pack CP00-952, latest_projection HrxCp952HrPermissionSensitiveGuardBridgeDescriptor, projections.cp952 present, validation.valid:true with no_write_attestation all-false). scripts/validate-rp30-hrx-people-contract.mjs chains the full CP897->CP952 upstream/next binding sequence plus CP952 coverage/descriptor/contract/capabilities/safety-gate checks and is read-only (readFile only). closeout-pack-plan.json packs[] CP00-952 (line 392) matches the binding with matching source_ledger_sha/hrx_source_ledger_sha and deviation_from_plan:false. A grep of packages/hrx/src and the validate script for writeFile/appendFile/child_process/spawn/fetch/eval/process.env/createWriteStream returned no matches, confirming no write/network/runtime/secret capability. command-evidence.json records node --check x3, node --test, npm run rp30:hrx:validate, and git diff --check all exit 0; no_real_data:true, writes_product_state:false.

Boundaries: Claude is read-only and not final approver everywhere (request read_only:true tools Read/Grep/Glob; descriptor authority_boundary and claude_packet). Enterprise trust is not claimed from local validation; human approval is required before runtime opens in CP00-953. The Hermes packet is deterministic_only with emits_runtime_receipt:false (control-plane review/evidence handling only, consistent with authority_boundary hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product:false). CP178+ hardening: readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1456-byte valid JSON); no prior CP00-952 raw-output/review-receipt exists, so no auth-failure/0-byte/malformed/fenced/tool-shaped/missing-field evidence is improperly counted as valid (valid_review_receipts and invalid_review_attempts empty). Changed-file scope matches active_pack_implementation_refs; the dirty progress-control-room files and untracked workbook/docx/ldip items are correctly preserved out of scope.

Pre-closeout posture is expected and honest: manifest status in_progress; adjudication/construction-inspection/claude-review-result all PENDING awaiting this review; the broader closeout command set, Hermes gate, and review receipt are pending finalization (identical to the CP951 state at its review time). The closeout_state_policy block carries the correct CP952 production_ready_flag and cp00-952 review_receipt_ref (no stale-block issue). blocks_goal_closeout is false: this CP's closeout goal is descriptor verification, which is met, and the pack does not claim runtime or enterprise trust. No P0/P1/P2/P3 issues found; eligible to proceed to closeout finalization.
